titleStmt.title: SII 26.279: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 279. (A.R. No. 264 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Rājarājadēva: Year 14, Dhanus (Mārgaḻi)-śu. 1, Uttirāḍam = 1229 A.D., December 18.

summary.p: This inscription records that a certain Kirandai Mālaippāgamvaittāṉ (Skt. Harihara) Śērikkūttaṉ donated a sandhi lamp to the temples of Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār of Tirukkachchūr alias Nittavinōdanallūr in Śeṅguṉṟanāḍu in Kaḷattūrk-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍśōḻa maṇḍalam. The donor is stated to be a local person. It is also stated that in order to provide for this gift, he endowed three naṟpaḻaṅkāśu which was received by the Śivabrāhmaṇa Umaiyōḍuṅkūḍaṉiṉṟāṉ Uyyakkoṇḍāṉ alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala-bhaṭṭaṉ who had right to worship in the temple and who had undertaken to burn the sandhi lamp once daily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu dhanunāya
ṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum Uttirāṭamum peṟṟanāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
ṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrk koṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūrāna nittavinotana
llūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyārkku Ivvūr kirantai mālaippākamvaittā
ṉ cerikkūttaṉ vaitta cantiviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukku Ikkoyilil kāṇi Uṭaiya civabrā
hmaṇaṉ bharadvāji Umaiyoṭuṅkūṭaṉiṉṟāṉ Uyyaṅkoṇṭāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉe
ṉ kaikkoṇṭa naṟpaḻaṅkācu 3 Ippaḻaṅkācu muṉṟukkum cantirātittavarai nāḷ Oṉṟukku
Oru cantiyile Oru cantiviḷakku Erikkak kaṭavanākac cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Uyyakko
ṇṭāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉeṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
